calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Dec-11-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Petitioner Edgar Mar Jauregui was present in pro per, placed under oath and examined.
Proof of Publication in the file.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to: Michelle Jauregui.

Decree Changing Name was submitted to and signed by the Court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Oct-23-2008 Reset To Dec-11-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Petitioner Edgar Mar Jauregui was present in pro per, placed under oath and examinied.
The Proof of Pubication that petitioner filed with the Court on October 21, 2008 is incorrect. Petitioner is instructed to seek assistance with this matter at the Access Center, and to re-publish the proposed name change.

Good cause appearing, today's hearing on the Order to Show Cause for Change of Name is continued to December 11, 2008 @ 9:00 a.m in Department 218.

Reissued Order to Show Cause for Change of Name was submitted to and signed by the Court.
